@startuml
actor "Web User" as WebUser1 #98AFC7 
participant index  #D5B6C2  
participant Main.view   #FBEBC4   
participant Image.View    #E0BBFF    
control ImageController     #CCFFFF     
entity DB      #DDFEFD      
database images       #FFECD3       
collections Images        #FFFFFF         
note right of Index : This works too\nin this case! 

activate WebUser1
WebUser1 ->index++: Need to see some Pictures
index->ImageControler ++: new ImageContoller( new DB(DBE))
deactivate index
DB-->images:getDNS();getUser():getPass()
imagecontroller -->db:new db(BDE::MySQL)


@enduml
